{{CargoOrgan
|name=Mane of Fate
|type=Bionic
|rank=orange
|id=10680
|idx=38
|description="The mane is woven from the threads of destiny — where chaos and order, apocalypse and oblivion, entwine into one."
— Codex Draconis
|skill=Blessed by the Goddess of Fate, dealing DMG equal to 202% of ATK!
|hp=2056
|def=154
|atk=151
|rush=335
|gene1=Per organ awakened, {race} HP +70
Organs awakened: 40/40
|gene2=Per Altar God Descent, {race} DEF +7
Gods Descended: 30/30
|gene3=Healing +9%
|gene4=Chance to trigger Stonehide +3%
|gene5=ELMT RES +3%
|gene7=Healing +9% (Awakened)
|}}
